parameters.value: {'id': '007_提交订单', 'title': '提交订单', 'method': 'POST', 'url': '/p/order/submit', 'header': {'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'Accept-Language': 'zh', 'Authorization': '${token_type}${access_token}'}, 'param': {'orderShopParam': [{'remarks': '', 'shopId': 1}]}, 'assertion': {'$..duplicateError': None}, 'presql': None, 'extract_data': {'orderNumbers': '$..orderNumbers'}, 'assert_db': {"select count(1) from tz_order where order_number = '${orderNumbers}'": 1, "select status from tz_order where order_number = '${orderNumbers}'": 1}}
